FX.title: [USD/JPY] DOWN: Geopolitical Risk Surge and Dovish Fed Pressure Weigh on the Pair
tldr_points: Iran geopolitical risk escalates with Hormuz closure threats, fueling yen safe-haven demand
Fed's Waller signals neutral policy stance, removing USD support
Technical structure suggests bearish momentum if 148.50 breaks decisively
FX.excerpt: Geopolitical risk and dovish Fed create bearish bias; monitor 148.50 support for breakdown scenario.
FX.comment: Geopolitical risk and dovish Fed create bearish bias; sell on 148.50 breakdown

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] NEUTRAL: Valuation Premiums Face Temporary Profit Dependency
tldr_points: Record valuations mask reliance on temporary profit catalysts
Wall Street's annual forecast misses suggest caution on bearish calls
Technical indicators unavailable, requiring price confirmation before positioning
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 faces valuation headwinds as profit drivers prove temporary, with technical setup unclear pending price confirmation.
STOCKS.comment: Valuation premiums face temporary profit dependency with technical confirmation pending

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Threshold Tested Ahead of Institutional Catalysts
tldr_points: Price testing MA20 support amid bullish macro catalysts
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC eyes breakout above MA20 as macro news aligns with bullish fundamentals.
CRYPTO.comment: BTC eyes breakout above MA20 as macro news aligns with bullish fundamentals.
